arts.ttl: West Ham v Everton, Wolves v Southampton, and more: clockwatch – live
arts.sum: Updates from Premier League 3pm kick-offs and more Live scores | Share your thoughts with Dom via email Game over. Lewis Baker with a bolt from the blue for Blackburn on the break. 3-1 and that will sink the home side. Cardiff 1-2 Blackburn: This cracking game is now getting the cracking finale it deserves, with Cardiff now piling on the pressure in search of an equaliser. John Eustace is wearing a worried look on the touchline as his team try to keep out the baying Bluebirds. Five minutes to go plus addeds. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Southampton
arts.sum: Wolves vs Southampton kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. Live text coverage of Wolves vs Southampton is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Southampton preview: Martin to put O'Neil friendship on hold
arts.sum: Wolves boss Gary O’Neil insists he is not worried about his future ahead of Saturday’s bottom of the table Premier League clash with Southampton . “I don’t ask the club for any backing or support, I’m very comfortable in this seat or on the side of the pitch.

arts.ttl: Wolves set Gary O’Neil major target as 42-year-old must achieve one thing to avoid sack this weekend
arts.sum: Despite picking up points against Crystal Palace and Brighton in his last two games, manager Gary O’Neil remains under huge pressure at Wolves. The 41-year-old has endured a tough start to the season. Failing to win a single game, Wolves remain rooted to the bottom of the table with just three points.
